Despicable Me 4 (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $361,004,205Details
International Box Office $625,702,209
Worldwide Box Office $986,706,414
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,614,336
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,950,231
Total $7,564,567
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Gru, supervillain-turned-Anti-Villain League-agent, returns for a new era of Minions mayhem, alongside his wife and fellow Anti-Villain League-agent Lucy, their three adopted girls—Margo, Edith and Agnes—and the newest member to the Gru family, Gru Jr., who is intent on tormenting his dad. The family is forced to go on the run when they become targeted by escaped criminal Maxime Le Mal and his femme fatale girlfriend Valentina.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$75,009,210 (20.8% of total gross)
Legs:4.81 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,428 opening theaters/4,449 max. theaters, 8.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $381,751,575

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 3rd, 2024 (Wide) by Universal
July 3rd, 2024 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: June 20th, 2024 (Wide), released as Mi villano favorito 4 (Uruguay)
June 20th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
June 20th, 2024 (Wide) (New Zealand)
June 20th, 2024 (Wide), released as Mi Villano Favorito 4 (Argentina)
June 27th, 2024 (Wide), released as Gru - O Maldisposto 4 (Portugal)
Video Release: August 6th, 2024 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for action and rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2826 (cert #54865), 3/20/2024)
Running Time: 94 minutes
Franchise: Despicable Me
Filming location (country): France
Plot point: Revenge
Social setting: Adopted Family
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Illumination Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Gru, supervillain-turned-Anti-Villain League-agent, returns for a new era of Minions mayhem, alongside his wife and fellow Anti-Villain League-agent Lucy, their three adopted girls—Margo, Edith and Agnes—and the newest member to the Gru family, Gru Jr., who is intent on tormenting his dad. The family is forced to go on the run when they become targeted by escaped criminal Maxime Le Mal and his femme fatale girlfriend Valentina.
